prose.en: Provide the capability to check the integrity of information while it resides in the external system.

guidance.en: Storage of organizational information in an external system could limit visibility into the security status of its data. The ability of the organization to verify and validate the integrity of its stored data without transferring it out of the external system provides such visibility.

prose.en: the capability is provided to check the integrity of information while it resides in the external system.

objects.en: acquisition contracts for the system, system component, or system service
organizational security requirements or conditions for external providers
Organizational personnel with system and service acquisition responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organization personnel with integrity checking responsibilities
organizational personnel with supply chain risk management responsibilities
mechanisms for supporting and implementing integrity checking of information in external systems
